case_title: REYNALDO ARELLANO VS. DUYEN TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARELLANO, REYNALDO AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DUYEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-03-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-31-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-19-2012
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-03-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2012 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST MARA E. ROSALES-CORDOVA, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-19-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-04-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARELLANO, REYNALDO SERVED MAY-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DUYEN
RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARELLANO, REYNALDO
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY ROSALES-CORDOVA, MARA ELIZABETH

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-07-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-21-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRAN, DUYEN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRAN, DUYEN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR ROSALES-CORDOVA, MARA ELIZABETH AS ATTORNEY FOR ARELLANO, REYNALDO
DECLARATION OF PLTF IN RESP TO OSC RE STATUS OF ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARELLANO, REYNALDO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-07-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. THE AUG-07-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-15-2012. THE SEP-11-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-25-2012.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR GEORGE W. KORTE.
ARBITRATOR RICHARD STEPHEN DIESTEL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-26-2012 THROUGH JAN-24-2013.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRAN, DUYEN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF OCT-26-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
